name: AnvilUpdateEvent
desc: AnvilUpdateEvent is fired whenever the input stacks (left or right) or the name in an anvil changed.

name: ServerChatEvent
desc:
This event is fired whenever a ServerboundChatPacket is received from a client
who has submitted their chat message.

name: WandererTradesEvent
desc: WandererTradesEvent is fired during reload by TagsUpdatedEvent.

name: VillageSiegeEvent
desc:
VillageSiegeEvent is fired just before a zombie siege finds a successful location in VillageSiege#tryToSetupSiege(ServerLevel), to give mods the chance to stop the siege.

This event is ICancellableEvent; canceling stops the siege.

This event does not have a result.

name: VillagerTradesEvent
desc: VillagerTradesEvent is fired during reload by TagsUpdatedEvent.

name: AddReloadListenerEvent
desc: The main ResourceManager is recreated on each reload, just after ReloadableServerResources's creation.

name: BlockEntityTypeAddBlocksEvent
desc: Allows injecting new blocks into a block entity's BlockEntityType#validBlocks field in a safe manner.

name: EntityLeaveLevelEvent
desc: This event is fired whenever an Entity leaves a Level.

name: EntityStruckByLightningEvent
desc:
EntityStruckByLightningEvent is fired when an Entity is about to be struck by lightening.
This event is fired whenever an EntityLightningBolt is updated to strike an Entity in LightningBolt#tick() via EventHooks#onEntityStruckByLightning(Entity, LightningBolt).

#lightning contains the instance of EntityLightningBolt attempting to strike an entity.

This event is ICancellableEvent.
If this event is canceled, the Entity is not struck by the lightening.

This event does not have a result.

name: ItemExpireEvent
desc:
Event that is fired when an ItemEntity's age has reached its maximum
lifespan.

name: ItemTossEvent
desc:
Event that is fired whenever a player tosses (Q) an item or drag-n-drops a
stack of items outside the inventory GUI screens.

name: ProjectileImpactEvent
desc:
This event is fired on the NeoForge#EVENT_BUS.
This event is fired when a projectile entity impacts something.
This event is fired via EventHooks#onProjectileImpact(Projectile, HitResult) This event is fired for all vanilla projectiles by Forge, custom projectiles should fire this event and check the result in a similar fashion.

name: TradeWithVillagerEvent
desc: Fired when a player trades with an AbstractVillager.

name: PlayerDestroyItemEvent
desc:
PlayerDestroyItemEvent is fired when a player destroys an item.
This event is fired whenever a player destroys an item in MultiPlayerGameMode#destroyBlock(BlockPos), MultiPlayerGameMode#useItem(Player, InteractionHand), MultiPlayerGameMode#useItemOn(LocalPlayer, InteractionHand, BlockHitResult) , Player#attack(Entity), Player#hurtCurrentlyUsedShield(float), Player#interactOn(Entity, InteractionHand), CommonHooks#getCraftingRemainingItem(ItemStack), ServerPlayerGameMode#useItem(ServerPlayer, Level, ItemStack, InteractionHand) , ServerPlayerGameMode#useItemOn(ServerPlayer, Level, ItemStack, InteractionHand, BlockHitResult) and ServerPlayerGameMode#destroyBlock(BlockPos).

#original contains the original ItemStack before the item was destroyed.

name: ClientInformationUpdatedEvent
desc:
ClientInformationUpdatedEvent is fired when a player changes server-synced client options,
specifically those in net.minecraft.server.level.ClientInformation.

name: PlayerFlyableFallEvent
desc: Occurs when a player falls, but is able to fly.

name: ArrowLooseEvent
desc:
ArrowLooseEvent is fired when a player stops using a bow.
This event is fired whenever a player stops using a bow in BowItem#releaseUsing(ItemStack, Level, LivingEntity, int).

#bow contains the ItemBow ItemStack that was used in this event.
#charge contains the value for how much the player had charged before stopping the shot.

This event is ICancellableEvent.
If this event is canceled, the player does not stop using the bow.
For crossbows, the charge will always be 1; Set it to -1 in order to prevent firing the arrow.

name: CanPlayerSleepEvent
desc: Called from ServerPlayer#startSleepInBed(BlockPos) when a player attempts to sleep.

name: SweepAttackEvent
desc: The SweepAttackEvent is fired when a Player attacks a target, after the CriticalHitEvent has been fired.

name: PermissionsChangedEvent
desc: This event will fire when the player is opped or deopped.

name: CriticalHitEvent
desc: This event is fired when a player attacks an entity in Player#attack(Entity).

name: BonemealEvent
desc: This event is called when a player attempts to use bone meal on a block.

name: AttackEntityEvent
desc:
AttackEntityEvent is fired when a player attacks an Entity.
This event is fired whenever a player attacks an Entity in Player#attack(Entity).

#target contains the Entity that was damaged by the player.

name: PlayerSetSpawnEvent
desc:
This event is fired when a player's spawn point is set or reset.
The event can be canceled, which will prevent the spawn point from being changed.

name: PlayerHeartTypeEvent
desc:
Fired by Gui.HeartType#forPlayer to allow mods to change the heart sprite which is displayed in the player's
health bar.

name: AnvilRepairEvent
desc: Fired when the player removes a "repaired" item from the Anvil's Output slot.

name: PlayerWakeUpEvent
desc:
This event is fired when the player is waking up.
This is merely for purposes of listening for this to happen.
There is nothing that can be manipulated with this event.

name: PlayerEnchantItemEvent
desc: This event fires when a player enchants an item, after IItemExtension#applyEnchantments has been called.

name: CanContinueSleepingEvent
desc: This event is fired when the game checks if a sleeping entity may continue sleeping.

name: PlayerSpawnPhantomsEvent
desc: This event is fired from PhantomSpawner#tick when phantoms would attempt to be spawned, with one event fired per player.

name: UseItemOnBlockEvent
desc: Fires on both the client and server thread when a player interacts with a block.

name: ItemFishedEvent
desc: This event is called when a player fishes an item.

name: ArrowNockEvent
desc:
ArrowNockEvent is fired when a player begins using a bow.
This event is fired whenever a player begins using a bow in BowItem#use(Level, Player, InteractionHand).

This event is ICancellableEvent.

name: PlayerRespawnPositionEvent
desc: Fired by PlayerList#respawn(ServerPlayer, boolean) before the server respawns a player.

name: PlayerNegotiationEvent
desc:
This event is fired on the server when a connection has started the Forge handshake,
Forge will wait for all enqueued work to be completed before proceeding further with the login process.

name: EntityJoinLevelEvent
desc: This event is fired whenever an Entity joins a Level.

name: EntityAttributeModificationEvent
desc:
EntityAttributeModificationEvent.
Use this event to add attributes to existing entity types.

name: EntityTeleportEvent
desc:
EntityTeleportEvent is fired when an event involving any teleportation of an Entity occurs.
If a method utilizes this Event as its parameter, the method will receive every child event of this class.

#getTarget() contains the target destination.
#getPrev() contains the entity's current position.

All children of this event are fired on the NeoForge#EVENT_BUS.

name: EntityInvulnerabilityCheckEvent
desc:
Fired when Entity#isInvulnerableTo(DamageSource) is invoked and determines if
downstream hurt logic should apply.

name: EntityMountEvent
desc:
This event gets fired whenever a entity mounts/dismounts another entity.
entityBeingMounted can be null, be sure to check for that.

name: EntityTravelToDimensionEvent
desc:
EntityTravelToDimensionEvent is fired before an Entity travels to a dimension.

#dimension contains the id of the dimension the entity is traveling to.

This event is net.neoforged.bus.api.ICancellableEvent.
If this event is canceled, the Entity does not travel to the dimension.

This event does not have a result.

name: EntityMobGriefingEvent
desc:
EntityMobGriefingEvent is fired when mob griefing is about to occur and allows an event listener to specify whether it should or not.
This event is fired when ever the GameRules#RULE_MOBGRIEFING mob griefing game rule is checked.

name: EntityAttributeCreationEvent
desc:
EntityAttributeCreationEvent.
Use this event to register attributes for your own EntityTypes.

name: LivingKnockBackEvent
desc: LivingKnockBackEvent is fired when a living entity is about to be knocked back.

name: LivingGetProjectileEvent
desc:
This event is fired when a living entity attempts to get a projectile with the
LivingEntity#getProjectile(ItemStack) method.

name: LivingExperienceDropEvent
desc:
Event for when an entity drops experience on its death, can be used to change
the amount of experience points dropped or completely prevent dropping of experience
by canceling the event.

name: LivingDrownEvent
desc: LivingDrownEvent is fired whenever a living entity can't breathe and its air supply is less than or equal to zero.

name: SpawnClusterSizeEvent
desc:
This event is fired from NaturalSpawner#spawnCategoryForPosition when the spawning
system determines the maximum amount of the selected entity that can spawn at the same time.

name: LivingBreatheEvent
desc:
LivingBreatheEvent is fired whenever a living entity ticks.

This event is fired via CommonHooks#onLivingBreathe(LivingEntity, int, int).

This event is not ICancellableEvent.

This event does not have a result.

name: LivingDeathEvent
desc: LivingDeathEvent is fired when an Entity dies.

name: EnderManAngerEvent
desc: This event is fired on the forge bus before an Enderman detects that a player is looking at them.

name: LivingDropsEvent
desc:
LivingDropsEvent is fired when an Entity's death causes dropped items to appear.
This event is fired whenever an Entity dies and drops items in LivingEntity#die(DamageSource).

This event is fired via the CommonHooks#onLivingDrops(LivingEntity, DamageSource, Collection, int, boolean) .

#source contains the DamageSource that caused the drop to occur.
#drops contains the ArrayList of EntityItems that will be dropped.
#lootingLevel contains the amount of loot that will be dropped.
#recentlyHit determines whether the Entity doing the drop has recently been damaged.

This event is ICancellableEvent.
If this event is canceled, the Entity does not drop anything.

This event does not have a result.

name: ArmorHurtEvent
desc:
Fired on both sides when a LivingEntity's armor is dealt damage in
LivingEntity#doHurtEquipment(DamageSource, float, EquipmentSlot...) doHurtEquipment.

name: LivingUseTotemEvent
desc: Fired when an Entity attempts to use a totem to prevent its death.

name: LivingDestroyBlockEvent
desc: Fired when the ender dragon or wither attempts to destroy a block and when ever a zombie attempts to break a door.

name: LivingHealEvent
desc: LivingHealEvent is fired when an Entity is set to be healed.

name: LivingFallEvent
desc:
LivingFallEvent is fired when an Entity is set to be falling.
This event is fired whenever an Entity is set to fall in LivingEntity#causeFallDamage(float, float, DamageSource).

This event is fired via the CommonHooks#onLivingFall(LivingEntity, float, float).

#distance contains the distance the Entity is to fall.

name: LivingEquipmentChangeEvent
desc: LivingEquipmentChangeEvent is fired when the Equipment of a Entity changes.

name: LivingIncomingDamageEvent
desc: LivingIncomingDamageEvent is fired when a LivingEntity is about to receive damage.

name: AnimalTameEvent
desc: This event is fired when an Animal is tamed.

name: LivingChangeTargetEvent
desc: This event allows you to change the target an entity has.

name: BabyEntitySpawnEvent
desc: BabyEntitySpawnEvent is fired just before a baby entity is about to be spawned.

name: EffectParticleModificationEvent
desc: Fires for each effect to allow modification or replacement of the particle options (you can set it to null to reset it to default).

name: LivingShieldBlockEvent
desc:
LivingShieldBlockEvent is fired when an entity is hurt and vanilla checks if the entity is attempting to block with a shield.
Cancelling this event will have the same impact as if the shield was not eligible to block.
The damage blocked cannot be set lower than zero or greater than the original value.

Note: This event fires whether the player is actively using a shield or not.

name: MobSplitEvent
desc: This event is fired whenever a mob is removed and splits into multiple children.

name: FinalizeSpawnEvent
desc:
This event is fired before Mob#finalizeSpawn is called.
This allows mods to control mob initialization.
In vanilla code, this event is injected by a transformer and not via patch, so calls cannot be traced via call hierarchy (it is not source-visible).

name: MobDespawnEvent
desc:
This event is fired from Mob#checkDespawn().
It fires once per tick per mob that is attempting to despawn.

name: RegisterSpawnPlacementsEvent
desc: This event allows each EntityType to have a SpawnPlacements.SpawnPredicate registered or modified.

name: PlayLevelSoundEvent
desc: PlayLevelSoundEvent is fired when a sound is played on a Level.

name: FurnaceFuelBurnTimeEvent
desc: FurnaceFuelBurnTimeEvent is fired when determining the fuel value for an ItemStack.

name: LootTableLoadEvent
desc: Fired when a LootTable is loaded from JSON.

name: RegisterCommandsEvent
desc: Commands are rebuilt whenever ReloadableServerResources is recreated.

name: ItemAttributeModifierEvent
desc: This event is fired when the attributes for an item stack are queried (for any reason) through ItemStack#getAttributeModifiers().

name: TagsUpdatedEvent
desc: Fired when tags are updated on either server or client.

name: ExplosionKnockbackEvent
desc:
ExplosionKnockbackEvent is fired once the explosion has calculated the knockback velocity to add to the entity caught in blast.

This event is not ICancellableEvent.
This event does not use HasResult.
This event is fired on the NeoForge#EVENT_BUS.

name: BlockGrowFeatureEvent
desc: This event is fired whenever a block (like a sapling) grows into a feature (like a tree).

name: BlockDropsEvent
desc: Fired when a block is broken and the drops have been determined, but before they have been added to the world.

name: CreateFluidSourceEvent
desc: Fired when a fluid checks if nearby blocks can convert it to a source block.

name: ModifyCustomSpawnersEvent
desc: This event is fired on the net.neoforged.fml.LogicalSide#SERVER logical server when a ServerLevel is building its CustomSpawner custom spawners.

name: ChunkTicketLevelUpdatedEvent
desc: This event is fired whenever a chunk has its ticket level changed via the server's ChunkMap.

name: AlterGroundEvent
desc:
This event is fired when AlterGroundDecorator#placeBlockAt(TreeDecorator.Context, BlockPos) attempts to alter a ground block when generating a feature.
An example of this would be large spruce trees converting grass blocks into podzol.

name: SleepFinishedTimeEvent
desc:
This event is fired when all players are asleep and the time should be set to day.
setWakeUpTime(wakeUpTime) sets a new time that will be added to the dayTime.

name: GameShuttingDownEvent
desc: A simple marker event that notifies when the game is about to close.

name: RegisterGameTestsEvent
desc: Game tests are registered on client or server startup.

name: StatAwardEvent
desc: Fired when a Player is awarded a Stat.

name: OnDatapackSyncEvent
desc:
Fires when a player joins the server or when the reload command is ran,
before tags and crafting recipes are sent to the client.

name: ItemStackedOnOtherEvent
desc:
This event provides the functionality of the pair of functions used for the Bundle, in one event:
  • Item#overrideOtherStackedOnMe(ItemStack, ItemStack, Slot, ClickAction, Player, SlotAccess)
  • Item#overrideStackedOnOther(ItemStack, Slot, ClickAction, Player)
This event is fired before either of the above are called, when a carried item is clicked on top of another in a GUI slot.

name: ServerStoppingEvent
desc: Called when the server begins an orderly shutdown, before ServerStoppedEvent.

name: ServerStoppedEvent
desc: Called after ServerStoppingEvent when the server has completely shut down.

name: ServerAboutToStartEvent
desc: Called before the server begins loading anything.

name: ServerStartingEvent
desc: Called after ServerAboutToStartEvent and before ServerStartedEvent.

name: ServerStartedEvent
desc: Called after ServerStartingEvent when the server is available and ready to play.

name: DifficultyChangeEvent
desc: DifficultyChangeEvent is fired when difficulty is changing.

name: EnchantmentLevelSetEvent
desc: Fired when the enchantment level is set for each of the three potential enchantments in the enchanting table.

name: GetEnchantmentLevelEvent
desc:
This event is fired whenever the enchantment level of a particular item is requested for gameplay purposes.
It is called from IItemStackExtension#getEnchantmentLevel(Enchantment) and IItemStackExtension#getAllEnchantments().

name: CommandEvent
desc: CommandEvent is fired after a command is parsed, but before it is executed.

name: ModMismatchEvent
desc:
Fires when the mod loader is in the process of loading a world that was last saved
with mod versions that differ from the currently-loaded versions.

name: RegisterStructureConversionsEvent
desc: Fired for registering structure conversions for pre-1.18.2 worlds.

name: VanillaGameEvent
desc: VanillaGameEvent is fired on the server whenever one of Vanilla's GameEvent GameEvents fire.

name: RegisterBrewingRecipesEvent
desc: Event to register new brewing recipes.

name: PlayerBrewedPotionEvent
desc: This event is called when a player picks up a potion from a brewing stand.

name: AddPackFindersEvent
desc: Fired on PackRepository creation to allow mods to add new pack finders.

name: XpOrbTargetingEvent
desc: Event to determine which player an XP Orb should follow.

name: RenderHandEvent
desc: Fired before a hand is rendered in the first person view.

name: RegisterDimensionSpecialEffectsEvent
desc: Allows users to register custom DimensionSpecialEffects for their dimensions.

name: RegisterShadersEvent
desc: Fired to allow mods to register custom ShaderInstance shaders.

name: ClientChatEvent
desc: Fired when the client is about to send a chat message to the server.

name: RenderNameTagEvent
desc: This event is fired before an entity renderer renders the nameplate of an entity.

name: RegisterGuiLayersEvent
desc: Allows users to register custom LayeredDraw.Layer layers for GUI rendering.

name: PlaySoundSourceEvent
desc: Fired when a non-streaming sound is being played.

name: SoundEngineLoadEvent
desc:
Fired when the SoundEngine is constructed or (re)loaded, such as during game initialization or when the sound
output device is changed.

name: PlaySoundEvent
desc: Fired when a sound is about to be played by the sound engine.

name: PlayStreamingSourceEvent
desc: Fired when a streaming sound is being played.

name: RegisterKeyMappingsEvent
desc: Allows users to register custom net.minecraft.client.KeyMapping key mappings.

name: RegisterJsonAnimationTypesEvent
desc:
Allows registering custom AnimationTargets and
AnimationChannel.Interpolation interpolation functions for loading JSON entity animation files.

name: RegisterPresetEditorsEvent
desc:
Event for registering PresetEditor screen factories for world presets.

This event is not ICancellableEvent cancellable, and does not HasResult have a result.

name: ToastAddEvent
desc: Fired when the client queues a Toast message to be shown onscreen.

name: RegisterClientCommandsEvent
desc: Fired to allow mods to register client commands.

name: MovementInputUpdateEvent
desc:
Fired after the player's movement inputs are updated.

This event is not ICancellableEvent cancellable, and does not Event.HasResult have a result.

This event is fired on the NeoForge#EVENT_BUS main Forge event bus, only on the LogicalSide#CLIENT logical client.

name: RegisterNamedRenderTypesEvent
desc: Allows users to register custom named RenderType render types.

name: ClientChatReceivedEvent
desc: Fired when a chat message is received on the client.

name: RegisterMaterialAtlasesEvent
desc:
Fired for registering TextureAtlas texture atlases that will be used with Material or
other systems which retrieve the atlas via Minecraft#getTextureAtlas(ResourceLocation) or
ModelManager#getAtlas(ResourceLocation).

name: CalculatePlayerTurnEvent
desc: Fired in MouseHandler#turnPlayer() MouseHandler#turnPlayer() when retrieving the values of Options#sensitivity() mouse sensitivity and Options#smoothCamera cinematic camera, prior to running calculations on these values.

name: CalculateDetachedCameraDistanceEvent
desc: Fired for hooking the maximum distance from the player to the camera in third-person view.

name: GatherSkippedAttributeTooltipsEvent
desc: This event is used to collect the IDs of attribute modifiers that will not be displayed in item tooltips.

name: RegisterSpriteSourceTypesEvent
desc: Fired to allow mods to register their own SpriteSourceType.

name: RegisterItemDecorationsEvent
desc: Allows users to register custom IItemDecorator IItemDecorator to Items.

name: RenderArmEvent
desc: Fired before the player's arm is rendered in first person.

name: AddSectionGeometryEvent
desc: This event can be used to add static geometry to chunk sections.

name: RegisterRecipeBookCategoriesEvent
desc: Allows users to register custom categories for the vanilla recipe book, making it usable in modded GUIs.

name: RenderBlockScreenEffectEvent
desc: Fired before a block texture will be overlaid on the player's view.

name: RegisterEntitySpectatorShadersEvent
desc: Allows users to register custom shaders to be used when the player spectates a certain kind of entity.

name: RegisterDimensionTransitionScreenEvent
desc: Event for registering screen effects when transitioning across dimensions.

name: GatherEffectScreenTooltipsEvent
desc: This event is called when an EffectRenderingInventoryScreen draws the tooltip lines for a hovered MobEffectInstance.

name: ClientPlayerChangeGameTypeEvent
desc: Fired when the client player is notified of a change of GameType from the server.

name: ScreenshotEvent
desc: Fired when a screenshot is taken, but before it is written to disk.

name: RegisterClientReloadListenersEvent
desc: Fired to allow mods to register their reload listeners on the client-side resource manager.

name: RenderLevelStageEvent
desc: Fires at various times during LevelRenderer.renderLevel.

name: RegisterClientTooltipComponentFactoriesEvent
desc:
Allows users to register custom net.minecraft.client.gui.screens.inventory.tooltip.ClientTooltipComponent
factories for their net.minecraft.world.inventory.tooltip.TooltipComponent types.

name: RegisterParticleProvidersEvent
desc: Fired for registering particle providers at the appropriate time.

name: RenderItemInFrameEvent
desc: Fired before an item stack is rendered in an item frame.

name: AddAttributeTooltipsEvent
desc: This event is fired after attribute tooltip lines have been added to an item stack's tooltip in AttributeUtil#addAttributeTooltips.

name: SelectMusicEvent
desc: Fired when the net.minecraft.client.sounds.MusicManager checks what situational music should be used.

name: ComputeFovModifierEvent
desc: Fired after the field of vision (FOV) modifier for the player is calculated to allow developers to adjust it further.

name: RegisterRenderBuffersEvent
desc: Fired to allow mods to register custom BufferBuilder render buffers.

name: RecipesUpdatedEvent
desc: Fired when the RecipeManager has received and synced the recipes from the server to the client.

name: TextureAtlasStitchedEvent
desc: Fired after a texture atlas is stitched together and all textures therein have been loaded.

name: RegisterTicketControllersEvent
desc: Fired in order to register chunk TicketController ticket controllers.

name: NewRegistryEvent
desc: Fired when new registries can be constructed and registered.

name: RegisterEvent
desc: Fired for each registry when it is ready to have modded objects registered.

name: ModifyRegistriesEvent
desc: Fired during startup after builtin registries are constructed.

name: DataMapsUpdatedEvent
desc:
Event fired on the net.neoforged.neoforge.common.NeoForge#EVENT_BUS game event bus when the data maps of
a registry have either been UpdateCause#CLIENT_SYNC synced to the client or UpdateCause#SERVER_RELOAD reloaded on the server.

name: RegisterDataMapTypesEvent
desc: Event fired on the mod event bus, in order to register DataMapType data map types.

name: IdMappingEvent
desc: Called whenever the ID mapping might have changed.

name: RegisterCauldronFluidContentEvent
desc: Event to register CauldronFluidContent for modded cauldrons.

name: RegisterCapabilitiesEvent
desc: Fired to register capability providers at an appropriate time.

name: RegisterConfigurationTasksEvent
desc:
Fired when the server configuration packet listener collects all the configuration tasks
that should be run on the server to configure the client.

name: RegisterPayloadHandlersEvent
desc: Event fired when the NetworkRegistry is being set up.

name: AddAttributeTooltipsEvent
desc: This event is fired after attribute tooltip lines have been added to an item stack's tooltip in AttributeUtil#addAttributeTooltips.

name: AddServerReloadListenersEvent
desc: The main ResourceManager is recreated on each reload, just after ReloadableServerResources's creation.

name: DefaultDataComponentsBoundEvent
desc: This event is emitted after data components have been bound to holders in a registry.

name: GatherSkippedAttributeTooltipsEvent
desc: This event is used to collect the IDs of attribute modifiers that will not be displayed in item tooltips.

name: AddClientReloadListenersEvent
desc: This event allows mods to register client-side reload listeners to the resource manager.

name: ClientResourceLoadFinishedEvent
desc:
Fires after the client has completed loading or reloading its resources
successfully.

name: ConfigureMainRenderTargetEvent
desc: Fired when configuring the MainTarget main render target during startup.

name: PlayerHeartTypeEvent
desc:
Fired by Gui.HeartType#forPlayer to allow mods to change the heart sprite which is displayed in the player's
health bar.

name: RecipesReceivedEvent
desc:
This event is fired on the client when it has finished receiving recipe data
from the server.

name: RegisterBlockStateModels
desc: Fire to register new types of CustomUnbakedBlockStateModel and CustomBlockModelDefinition.

name: RegisterConditionalItemModelPropertyEvent
desc: Event fired when special model renderers are registered.

name: RegisterCustomEnvironmentEffectRendererEvent
desc:
Allows users to register custom environmental effect renderers, such as CustomCloudsRenderer,
CustomSkyboxRenderer or CustomWeatherEffectRenderer.

name: RegisterItemModelsEvent
desc: Event fired when item models are registered.

name: RegisterParticleGroupsEvent
desc: Fired for registering additional ParticleGroup particle group factories.

name: RegisterRangeSelectItemModelPropertyEvent
desc: Event fired when special model renderers are registered.

name: RegisterRecipeBookSearchCategoriesEvent
desc: Event to register ExtendedRecipeBookCategory instances for search.

name: RegisterRenderPipelinesEvent
desc: Fired to allow mods to register custom RenderPipeline pipelines.

name: RegisterSelectItemModelPropertyEvent
desc: Event fired when item model property selectors are registered.

name: RegisterSpecialModelRendererEvent
desc: Event fired when special model renderers are registered.

name: RegisterSpriteSourcesEvent
desc: Fired to allow mods to register their own SpriteSource codecs.

name: RegisterTextureAtlasesEvent
desc: Fired for registering TextureAtlas texture atlases to the AtlasManager.

name: ClientStartedEvent
desc: Emitted right before the client ticks for the first time.

name: ClientStoppedEvent
desc: Called after ClientStoppingEvent when the client has completely shut down.

name: ClientStoppingEvent
desc: Called when the client begins an orderly shutdown, before ClientStoppedEvent.

name: RegisterClientPayloadHandlersEvent
desc: Event fired on the mod event bus when the ClientNetworkRegistry is being set up.

name: RegisterRenderStateModifiersEvent
desc: Fired for registering modifier functions for various render state objects.
